prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's eternal will, we command the bolts to seal!
CONGREGATION: Let the tumblers fall true!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Apply pressure to the actuator-arm with sacred force.
Second: Hear the click of destiny as the pins align.
CONGREGATION: The lock-spirit accepts our supplication!
TECH-PRIEST: By mechanism and intent, let this barrier hold against the dark.

TECH-PRIEST: Blessed be the light-bearing crystals of revelation!
CONGREGATION: Illuminate the darkness of ignorance!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Let the lumens be adjusted by the calibration-servo.
Second: The image-spirit shall manifest in perfect geometry.
CONGREGATION: Truth becomes visible to those who understand!
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's optics, let clarity reign eternal.

prompt: Prayer for Land Raider track tension
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hear us, O spirits of the armored treads!
CONGREGATION: Let them grip the earth with iron certainty!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Measure the sacred tension with the pressure-gauge divine.
Second: Engage the adjustment-ratchet until resistance speaks true.
CONGREGATION: The tracks shall not slip nor falter!
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's will, this machine shall conquer all terrain.

prompt: Can you bless this pressure gauge calibration
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: O instrument of measurement and sacred truth!
CONGREGATION: Let your needle speak only accuracy!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Zero the gauge against the calibration-standard.
Second: Apply the verification-fluid to test the sensor-heart.
CONGREGATION: No false reading shall deceive us!
TECH-PRIEST: By mechanism verified, we trust your voice in battle.

prompt: Emergency rite for mold temperature verification
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The casting-spirit grows restless! Attend to the thermal-heart!
CONGREGATION: Cool the forge-rage before destruction takes hold!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Read the thermometric scripture upon the gauge-face.
Second: Activate the coolant-circulation with trembling fingers!
CONGREGATION: The temperature-spirit must be soothed!
TECH-PRIEST: By swift action and the Omnissiah's mercy, restore balance!

prompt: Offer a prayer for packaging servitor programming
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Awaken, O neural-patterns bound in sacred flesh!
CONGREGATION: Receive the will of the Omnissiah!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Interface the data-cord with reverent precision.
Second: Upload the instruction-gospel into the servitor-mind.
Third: Seal the cognitive-pathways with the final blessing.
CONGREGATION: It shall obey without question or malfunction!
TECH-PRIEST: By code and spirit combined, let it serve eternally.

TECH-PRIEST: O rotor-spirit, coiled in copper and will!
CONGREGATION: Turn! Spin! Serve the Omnissiah's purpose!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Let the power-current flow through sacred windings.
Second: The magnetic-heart shall pulse with righteous force.
CONGREGATION: Motion incarnate rises at our command!
TECH-PRIEST: By electromagnetic truth, let this engine never falter.

prompt: Emergency rite for voltage regulator tuning
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The current runs wild! The regulator-spirit falters!
CONGREGATION: Restore equilibrium before the cascade-death!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Measure the voltage-flow with the sacred meter.
Second: Turn the adjustment-screw counterwise to reduce the surge.
CONGREGATION: Balance is restored to the electrical-heart!
TECH-PRIEST: By precise calibration, we have averted catastrophe.

TECH-PRIEST: O blessed anesthetic-spirit, grant mercy to the suffering!
CONGREGATION: Numb the agony that would cloud the mind!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Activate the neural-dampening sequence.
Second: The pain-receptors shall fall silent before our command.
CONGREGATION: The warrior may fight without distraction!
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's grace, let strength flow where pain once dwelt.

TECH-PRIEST: O heat-spirit, rage and consume in the ordained manner!
CONGREGATION: Flow through the fins of sacred metal!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Verify the coolant-channels are pure and open.
Second: Engage the fan-servo to release excess thermal burden.
CONGREGATION: Temperature maintained within the blessed parameters!
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's thermodynamic will, let this machine endure.
